name: OneDrive Configuration
categoryDescription: Modern Windows artifacts — UWP/AppX packages, OneDrive, and Windows Subsystem for Linux.
description: OneDrive sync configuration — user account, sync folder path, and tenant information.
forensic_value: SyncFolder path reveals where OneDrive syncs to locally. UserEmail identifies the Microsoft account. If OneDrive is running, synced files may be exfiltrated automatically — establishing what was in the sync folder at the time of compromise is important.
